_doc: Pairs of concept slugs that bin/check-concept-similarity.py should
skip when comparing tag-overlap and perceptual-hash distance.
Add an entry here when the Proprietor has reviewed a flagged pair
and decided to keep both — typically because the third (or
fourth) axis genuinely separates them in spite of the overlap, or
because both mockups are placeholders awaiting a refresh and the
Each entry is either a 2-element array of slugs:
or an annotated object with a required `slugs` field and a `note`:
Order doesn't matter. Prefer the annotated form so the next person
to look knows why the pair was waved through.

pairs.note: Borderline pHash distance (8/64). Tags are fully distinct: emoji is y2k-free contemporary gift-shop collage in bright pastels, futurism is pre-1950 scarlet+ink manifesto poster. Thumbnails share a diagonal-energy silhouette but read differently at card size.
